text: 65. Subcontractor is responsible for completing adequate coordination/review efforts of plans and specifications ahead of all work to be performed. All concerns, missing information, and discrepancies are to be brought to the General Contractors attention in a timely manner ahead of the work to be performed, in order to prevent delays to the work in question and/or the project schedule. Any delay to the project due to the failure of this subcontractor notifying the General Contractor of said concerns in a timely manner will be rectified at the Subcontractor's expense.
